A tailored profile named \"{{name}}\" al: A tailored profile named "{{name}}" already exists with different settings. Choose another name.
Cluster benchmark compliance, scanned by: Cluster benchmark compliance, scanned by the Compliance Operator.
{{name}} will stop being applied. A resc: {{name}} will stop being applied. A rescan is required afterwards for results to reflect the change.
After each scan, available remediations: After each scan, available remediations will apply automatically. Node remediations render into MachineConfigs and trigger rolling node reboots.
Export is unavailable while check result: Export is unavailable while check results fail to load.
Waiting for check results to load.
Rescan is unavailable while compliance d: Rescan is unavailable while compliance data fails to load.
You do not have permission to rescan.
No owned scans to rescan yet. Enable a p: No owned scans to rescan yet. Enable a profile first.
Some scans did start. Results will updat: Some scans did start. Results will update when those scans complete.
Invalid schedule. Use a five-field cron: Invalid schedule. Use a five-field cron expression.
Base profile name is invalid. Use lowerc: Base profile name is invalid. Use lowercase letters, digits, - and .; must start and end with a letter or digit.
No ClusterBaseline resource found. Insta: No ClusterBaseline resource found. Install the baseline-security operator from OperatorHub to start scanning.
Scoring mode changed since some history: Scoring mode changed since some history points were recorded. Older points may not be comparable; the next completed scan starts a fresh trend under the new mode.
View full check details in OpenShift: View full check details in OpenShift
No check results yet. Score is unavailab: No check results yet. Score is unavailable until a scan completes.
Node remediations render into MachineCon: Node remediations render into MachineConfigs. Applying them triggers rolling node reboots.
Failed to rescan {{count}} of {{total}}: Failed to rescan {{formattedCount}} of {{formattedTotal}} scans. Check permissions and try again.
CIS Red Hat OpenShift Container Platform: CIS Red Hat OpenShift Container Platform Benchmark

It renders into a MachineConfig; applyin: It renders into a MachineConfig; applying it reboots the affected nodes one by one. To batch changes, pause the target MachineConfigPool first (Compute -> MachineConfigPools) and resume it when done.
{{name}} will be applied to the cluster. A rescan is required afterwards for results to reflect the change.
Nodes disagree on this rule; review each: Nodes disagree on this rule; review each before acting.
This rule applies to only some nodes. It: This rule applies to only some nodes. It passes where it applies; the others report not-applicable.
This check is waived (excluded from the: This check is waived (excluded from the score).
Accept this failing check as risk to exc: Accept this failing check as risk to exclude it from the score.
Waiver fields are invalid or exceed leng: Waiver fields are invalid or exceed length limits (name 253, reason 1024, attribution 253).
Maximum of {{max}} waivers reached. Remo: Maximum of {{formattedMax}} waivers reached. Remove one before adding another.
This check is waived, but it is not curr: This check is waived, but it is not currently failing, so it is not excluded from the score. Remove the waiver if it is no longer needed.
This waiver has expired; the check is sc: This waiver has expired; the check is scored by its status again.
{{count}} check newly failing since the: {{formattedCount}} check newly failing since the last scan
{{formattedCount}} checks newly failing since the last scan
Blocked: apply the prerequisite remediat: Blocked: apply the prerequisite remediations first.
Blocked: missing dependency {{deps}}. Ap: Blocked: missing dependency {{deps}}. Apply its remediations first.
The affected MachineConfigPools are paus: The affected MachineConfigPools are paused, the {{formattedCount}} node remediation is applied, then the pools resume so nodes reboot once instead of per remediation. A rescan is required afterwards.

The affected MachineConfigPools are paused, all {{formattedCount}} node remediations are applied, then the pools resume so nodes reboot once instead of per remediation. A rescan is required afterwards.
Name: Name
The Compliance Operator generates remedi: The Compliance Operator generates remediations for failing checks that can be auto-fixed. None are available yet; rescan after new failures appear.
Tailored profile \"{{name}}\" was create: Tailored profile "{{name}}" was created but could not be bound: {{detail}}. Retry to bind it.
Tailored profile "{{name}}" was created but could not be bound (limit of {{formattedMax}} tailored profiles reached). Remove one, then retry.
Use lowercase letters, digits, - and .;: Use lowercase letters, digits, - and .; must start and end with a letter or digit.
No changes since the last scan: No changes since the last scan
No previous scan to compare yet: No previous scan to compare yet
Compliance score {{score}} of 100. Compo: Compliance score {{score}} of 100. Composition of compliance check results.
Rescan started. Results will update when: Rescan started. Results will update when the scan completes.
No profiles are selected. Enable a profi: No profiles are selected. Enable a profile to resume scanning.
Fail and fix deltas will appear here aft: Fail and fix deltas will appear here after the next completed scan.
Run a scan, then rescan later to see new: Run a scan, then rescan later to see newly failing and fixed checks.
Five-field cron (minute hour day-of-mont: Five-field cron (minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week). Example: 0 1 * * *
You do not have permission to waive chec: You do not have permission to waive checks.
You do not have permission to edit the b: You do not have permission to edit the baseline.
You do not have permission to apply reme: You do not have permission to apply remediations.
Waiver removed. The check counts toward: Waiver removed. The check counts toward the score again.
Check waived. It is excluded from the sc: Check waived. It is excluded from the score.
Remediation applied. Use Rescan now abov: Remediation applied. Use Rescan now above to refresh results.
Remediation unapplied. Use Rescan now ab: Remediation unapplied. Use Rescan now above to refresh results.
MachineConfigPools are paused while node: MachineConfigPools are paused while node remediations apply. This clears when the batch finishes.
Results appear after a scan completes. U: Results appear after a scan completes. Use Rescan now above to start a scan.
Batch apply started. Nodes will reboot o: Batch apply started. Nodes will reboot once when the pools resume.
Compliance Operator profile name this ta: Compliance Operator profile name this tailored profile extends (for example ocp4-cis).
Optional. One Compliance Operator rule n: Optional. One Compliance Operator rule name per line to disable in the base profile.
Title: Title
{{profile}} enabled. Scans will include: {{profile}} enabled. Scans will include this profile on the next run.
Report downloaded as compliance-report.h: Report downloaded as compliance-report.html (popup was blocked).
Waiting for compliance data to load.
Copy to clipboard is unavailable in this: Copy to clipboard is unavailable in this browser.
Expiry or review date is invalid. Use a: Expiry or review date is invalid. Use a valid calendar date.
These TailoredProfiles are included in s: These TailoredProfiles are included in scans. Unbind to stop scanning them; the resource in openshift-compliance is kept.
\"{{name}}\" will no longer be included: "{{name}}" will no longer be included in compliance scans. The TailoredProfile resource is not deleted.
Tailored profile \"{{name}}\" unbound. I: Tailored profile "{{name}}" unbound. It is no longer included in scans.
{{profile}} disabled. Scanning is off un: {{profile}} disabled. Scanning is off until you enable a profile.
Tailored profile \"{{name}}\" unbound. S: Tailored profile "{{name}}" unbound. Scanning is off until you enable a profile.
Disabling {{profile}} removes the last s: Disabling {{profile}} removes the last selected profile. Scheduled scans and rescan stop until you enable a profile again.
This is the last selected profile: This is the last selected profile
Scheduled scans and rescan will stop unt: Scheduled scans and rescan will stop until you enable a profile again.
Score moved from {{from}} to {{to}} over: Score moved from {{from}} to {{to}} over {{scans}} scans.
No check results match the current filte: No check results match the current filters. Clear or change filters to see more.
It renders into a MachineConfig; unapply: It renders into a MachineConfig; unapplying it reboots the affected nodes one by one.
The rule was removed or its profile unbo: The rule was removed or its profile unbound, so these waivers no longer match a result but still exclude it from scoring. Remove any that are no longer needed.
